steps.title: Recognize that rate means slope
steps.content: The question asks how many candy bars per second, which is the rate of change. For a linear graph, rate equals slope: $$\text{slope} = \frac{\Delta y}{\Delta x} = \frac{\text{change in candy bars}}{\text{change in seconds}}$$

steps.title: Read two points from the graph and calculate slope
steps.content: The line passes through $(0, 0)$ and $(2, 80)$. Using the slope formula: $$\text{slope} = \frac{80 - 0}{2 - 0} = \frac{80}{2} = 40$$ The machine wraps 40 candy bars per second. That matches choice B — B is correct.
